summary.lv: Credit Solutions (Mellenu Holding) meklē Tīkla administratoru digitālo finanšu pakalpojumu uzņēmumā. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €2500–2700 mēnesī.
summary.en: Credit Solutions (Mellenu Holding), a digital consumer lending platform, is seeking a Network Administrator in a hybrid role in Riga offering €2,500–2,700/month.
